title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICICI Prudential Life - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICICI Prudential Life - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, ICICI Prudential Life in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ICICI Prudential Life:
ICICI Prudential Life is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Prudential Life!
